Document.title: Document
Document.description: Represents a document uploaded to the system for analysis.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Document entity.

fileName.description: The original file name of the uploaded document.

fileType.description: The type of the uploaded document (e.g., 'pdf', 'text').

uploadDate.description: The date and time when the document was uploaded.

content.description: The textual content of the document, extracted for analysis.

AnalysisInstruction.title: AnalysisInstruction
AnalysisInstruction.description: Represents the instructions provided by the administrator for analyzing documents.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AnalysisInstruction entity.

instructionText.description: The text of the analysis instruction.

creationDate.description: The date and time when the analysis instruction was created.

DocumentAnalysis.title: DocumentAnalysis
DocumentAnalysis.description: Represents the result of analyzing a document based on specific instructions.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DocumentAnalysis entity.

analysisResult.description: The result of analyzing the document based on the provided instructions.

analysisDate.description: The date and time when the document analysis was performed.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a message in the conversation between the user and the AI chat agent.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

userId.description: The user id to identify which user generate the message

messageText.description: The text content of the chat message.

timestamp.description: The date and time when the message was sent.

isUserMessage.description: Indicates whether the message was sent by the user (true) or the AI agent (false).

definition.description: Stores all user-uploaded documents in a single global collection.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The unique ID of the document.

definition.description: Stores analysis instructions provided by the administrator.

params.name: analysisInstructionId
params.description: The unique ID of the analysis instruction.

definition.description: Stores the results of analyzing documents based on specific instructions.

params.name: documentId
params.description: The ID of the document being analyzed.

params.name: analysisId
params.description: The unique ID of the document analysis.

definition.description: Stores all chat messages in a single global collection.

params.name: messageId
params.description: The unique ID of the chat message.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to support the DocuChat AI application as a shared knowledge base. All documents and chat messages are stored in global collections to be accessible by any user, promoting a collaborative environment. This removes the need for user-specific data paths. 

**Authorization Independence:** Documents and chat messages are in top-level collections (`/documents`, `/chat_messages`). Access is controlled globally for all authenticated users.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** Security rules will allow any authenticated user to read and write to the shared collections, which is efficient and secure for this public-access model.
